notes: Zenodo is a general-purpose open research repository operated by CERN. Numeric record IDs.

data.description: Zenodo record identified by numeric ID.
data.notes: Zenodo is built and operated by CERN and OpenAIRE. It accepts any research output: papers, datasets, software, presentations. Each record gets a DOI (10.5281/zenodo.{id}). Supports versioning — each version gets its own record ID, with a concept DOI linking all versions.
